english_text: I'll make it to the top
I won't give up on my dream
I'll show you what I can do
korean_text: 내가 뭘 할 수 있는지 보여 줄게
romanization: naega mwol hal su innenji boyeo julge

english_text: My dream is to own a restaurant
Food has the power to change people
I cook with all my heart
I want to create something meaningful
Don't let anyone define your limits
korean_text: 아무도 네 한계를 정하게 하지 마
romanization: amudo ne hangyereul jeonghage haji ma

english_text: I was bullied for being different
I turned my weakness into strength
The night is darkest before dawn
I have people who believe in me
Thank you for being on my side
The best is yet to come
I'm proud of how far I've come

korean_text: 내 이야기가 다른 사람에게 영감을 줘
romanization: nae iyagiga dareun saramege yeonggameul jwo

english_text: Itaewon is where dreams come alive
The future belongs to those who dare
